code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut longest = ""
mut longest_len = 0
mut current = ""
mut current_len = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  mut is_ws = true
  mut b = 0
  if i < n
    b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b > 32
      is_ws = false
    end
  end

  if is_ws
    if current_len > longest_len
      longest = current
      longest_len = current_len
    end
    current = ""
    current_len = 0
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    current_len = current_len + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("longest=#{longest}")
